title: Unit AI Combat Decision Loop
interaction_flow: GameLoop → UnitComp: update() [every tick]
UnitComp → UnitComp: type.update(self()) — UnitType tick hook
UnitComp → WeaponsComp: update() — component chaining (generated entity)
WeaponsComp → Weapon: update(unit, mount) [for each WeaponMount in mounts[]]
UnitComp → AIController: controller.updateUnit() [only if !net.client() && !dead && shouldUpdateController()]
AIController.updateUnit(): check useFallback() — if true and fallback != null → fallback.updateUnit() and return
AIController → AIController: updateVisuals() — wobble, lookAt(prefRotation()) for flying units
AIController → AIController: updateTargeting() — calls updateWeapons() if unit.hasWeapons()
AIController → AIController: updateMovement() — empty in base; subclasses override
AIController.updateWeapons(): retarget() checks timer (40t no-target / 90t with-target)
AIController → Units: findMainTarget(x, y, range, targetAir, targetGround) → closestTarget()
AIController → Units: invalid(target) → invalidateTarget(target, team, x, y) — nulls stale target
AIController [loop mounts]: for each WeaponMount mount
AIController → Weapon: weapon.range() → bullet.range
AIController [if singleTarget]: mount.target = target (shared target)
AIController [else]: findTarget(mountX, mountY, wrange, collidesAir, collidesGround)
AIController [if autoDropBombs & !shoot]: Units.closestTarget() for bomberTarget
AIController → Predict: intercept(unit, mount.target, weapon.bullet) → Vec2 aim
AIController → WeaponMount: set mount.aimX, mount.aimY, mount.shoot=true, mount.rotate=true
AIController → UnitComp: unit.isShooting |= mount.shoot
AIController [if shoot]: unit.aimX = mount.aimX, unit.aimY = mount.aimY
FlyingAI.updateMovement() [extends AIController]:
[if target != null && unit.hasWeapons()]
[if type.circleTarget]: AIController.circleAttack(type.circleTargetRadius)
[else]: AIController.moveTo(target, type.range * 0.8f) + unit.lookAt(target)
[if target==null && waves]: moveTo(getClosestSpawner(), dropZoneRadius + 130f)
AIController.moveTo(target, circleLength): vec.set(target).sub(unit), vec.setLength(speed * length), unit.movePref(vec)
AIController.circleAttack(circleLength): vec.set(target).sub(unit), adjust angle, vec.setLength(prefSpeed()), unit.movePref(vec)
UnitComp.movePref(vec): if omniMovement → moveAt(vec) else rotateMove(vec)
UnitComp.moveAt(vector, accel): tmp1=vector; delta=tmp1-vel limited to accel*len*dt; vel.add(delta)
UnitComp.rotateMove(vec): moveAt(Tmp.v2.trns(rotation, vec.len())); rotation = Angles.moveToward(rotation, vec.angle(), rotateSpeed*dt)
Weapon.update(unit, mount) [called by WeaponsComp each tick]:
mount.reload -= Time.delta * unit.reloadMultiplier
update warmup: mount.warmup = lerpDelta(warmup, warmupTarget, shootWarmupSpeed) where warmupTarget=(mount.shoot||continuous bullet) ? 1 : 0
[if !controllable && autoTarget]: weapon self-targets via findTarget(); sets mount.shoot, mount.aimX/Y
[if rotate && (mount.rotate||mount.shoot)]: mount.rotation = Angles.moveToward(rotation, targetRotation, rotateSpeed*dt)
fire condition check: mount.shoot && can && !killShooter && ammo>0 && warmup>=minWarmup && reload<=0 && within(shootCone)
[fire]: Weapon.shoot(unit, mount, bulletX, bulletY, shootAngle)
mount.reload = reload (reset)
Weapon.shoot(unit, mount, bulletX, bulletY, rotation):
unit.apply(shootStatus, shootStatusDuration)
[if firstShotDelay>0]: mount.charging=true, chargeSound.at(), bullet.chargeEffect.at()
shoot.shoot(barrelCounter, (xOff,yOff,angle,delay,mover) → bullet(unit,mount,...)) — ShootPattern iterates shots
[if delay>0]: Time.run(delay, () → bullet())
[else]: bullet(unit, mount, xOffset, yOffset, angleOffset, mover)
Weapon.bullet(unit, mount, ...): BulletType.create(unit, shooter, team, bulletX, bulletY, angle, ...) → spawns Bullet entity
Weapon.bullet(): ejectEffect.at(), bullet.shootEffect.at(), bullet.smokeEffect.at()
Weapon.bullet(): unit.vel.add(recoil knockback); mount.recoil=1f; mount.heat=1f
key_conditions: Fallback delegation: if useFallback() && fallback != null → fully delegates, skips rest
retarget() timer: every 40 ticks if no target, every 90 ticks if has target (randomized at init)
weapon.controllable && !weapon.noAttack && weapon.aiControllable required for AIController to manage mount
shoot condition: mount.shoot && canShoot() && reload<=0 && warmup>=minWarmup && Angles.within(rotation, targetRotation, shootCone)
autoDropBombs: fallback bomb targeting when within-range check fails for flying units
singleTarget=true: all mounts share same target; false: each mount finds its own target
key_relationships: UnitComp implements Unitc, Weaponsc (and many more) via @Component annotation
AIController implements UnitController interface (updateUnit, unit(), unit(Unit), afterRead)
UnitComp.controller: UnitController (composition, holds AIController or subclass)
WeaponMount.weapon: Weapon (reference to UnitType weapon definition)
GroundAI extends AIController — overrides updateMovement() with pathfind()
CommandAI extends AIController — overrides updateUnit() entirely, may delegate to commandController
UnitType.weapons: Seq<Weapon> — weapon definitions cloned to WeaponMount[] at setType()

data_flow_summary.targeting: AIController.updateWeapons() → sets mount.target, mount.aimX, mount.aimY, mount.shoot on each WeaponMount
data_flow_summary.movement: AIController.updateMovement() subclass → moveTo/circleAttack → unit.movePref() → unit.moveAt() → vel mutated
data_flow_summary.firing: WeaponsComp.update() → Weapon.update(unit, mount) reads mount.shoot → Weapon.shoot() → Weapon.bullet() → BulletType.create()
data_flow_summary.ordering: UnitComp.update() runs controller.updateUnit() (targeting+movement); WeaponsComp.update() runs weapon ticks (firing) — both called per entity update()

important_notes: WeaponsComp.update() and UnitComp.update() are separate component update methods merged by annotation processor into generated Unit class — both run every tick
AIController sets mount.shoot flag; Weapon.update() (in WeaponsComp) reads that flag and fires — decoupled targeting from bullet creation
Weapon can also self-target if !controllable && autoTarget=true, bypassing AIController targeting
CommandAI.updateUnit() overrides entirely: processes stances (mineAuto, etc), then either delegates to commandController.updateUnit() or calls defaultBehavior()
prefSpeed() = unit.speed() = type.speed * strafePenalty * boostMultiplier * floorSpeedMultiplier
Predict.intercept() used for lead targeting — weapon.bullet velocity factored into aim point
Bullet spawned with shooter = MissileAI.shooter (if missile) or unit itself
